claim_boundary: This audit separates C-MAPSS score gaps from exact-native protocol gaps. It does not authorize official or literature-wide SOTA wording.

requirement_rows.evidence: exact-native gate and native preprocessing manifest pass all non-baseline C-MAPSS fields
field-level contract exists, but no published baseline is exact-reproduced
open full text, hyperparameters, architecture fields, Table-4 key sensors, and raw-count reconciliation are materialized
strategy audit reports a complete FD001-FD004 three-seed local branch archive

requirement_rows.requirement: exact MDFA preprocessing and label policy
requirement_rows.evidence: PCA cumulative threshold and exact test-label scoring policy are not machine-readable; selected local branches intentionally deviate from MDFA preprocessing
local full branches use 100 epochs/batch 32 but selected window/dropout/condition policies are not budget-equivalent to the published MDFA protocol
backbone audit keeps path fusion closed until it beats the same-window temporal anchor under the pseudo-terminal validation panel

mdfa_budget_matrix.feature_policy: Table-4/key-sensor PCA policy, exact PCA threshold unresolved

mdfa_budget_matrix.temporal_feature_mode: level for FD001; level_diff for FD003
mdfa_budget_matrix.claim_use: local source-style candidate, not exact MDFA reproduction
condition-aware local candidate, intentionally deviates from exact MDFA preprocessing

mdfa_external_source_resolution.evidence: MDPI article page identifies Applied Sciences 2025, 15(17), 9813 and DOI 10.3390/app15179813.
The article states a piecewise linear RUL strategy and sets the initial RUL to 125.
The article lists FD001-FD004 operating conditions, fault modes, and train/test unit counts.
The article lists batch_size 32, window_size 30, epoch 100, Adam, MSE, learning rate 0.0001, and dropout 0.3.
The article lists the parallel dilated convolution branches with dilation rates 1, 2, and 4 and attention/fusion module settings.
The article's Table 4 lists key C-MAPSS sensor variables including Ps30, T24, T30, P30, Phi, Nf, Nc, and W31/W32.

mdfa_external_source_resolution.field: PCA threshold or per-subset component count
mdfa_external_source_resolution.evidence: The article states that PCA components are selected by cumulative contribution rate and references Figure 4, but does not provide a numeric threshold or exact component counts.

mdfa_external_source_resolution.field: source code or supplementary reproduction package
mdfa_external_source_resolution.evidence: The article page exposes no Supplementary or GitHub entry, and the data availability statement says supporting data are available from the corresponding author upon reasonable request.

next_actions: Do not spend the next run on broad architecture search; the source audit now shows the MDFA paper is partially machine-readable but does not expose the PCA threshold or code needed for exact reproduction.

For exact MDFA reproduction, obtain the missing PCA threshold/per-subset component policy and any source code from the authors, then rerun the source-compatible window=30/dropout=0.3/batch=32/epoch=100 route with archived per-engine predictions.
For local SOTA-style evidence, target FD001/FD003 residual RMSE gaps while keeping the claim outside official MDFA reproduction wording.
Keep C-MAPSS path fusion as a challenger until it beats the w160/cap150 temporal anchor on the train-only pseudo-terminal validation panel.
